sources.title_original: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle
sources.summary: Five tech giants have $1.65 trillion in data center obligations that are listed off their balance sheets. These liabilities are added as footnotes in their quarterly statements but will become due and payable once these data centers start operating.
sources.summary_zh: 五家科技巨头有 1.65 万亿美元的数据中心债务，这些债务已从其资产负债表中列出。这些负债作为脚注添加到季度报表中，但一旦这些数据中心开始运营，这些负债将到期应付。

stories.title: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale

sources.title: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
sources.title_en: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
sources.title_original: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
sources.summary: The trend towards larger AI models continues, with China's new Kimi K3 model. With its trillions of parameters, it's just as capable as the best the West has to offer, and it's cheaper. But it's not as fast, giving rise to a new battle to balance performance, efficiency, and cost, alongside sovereign control.
sources.summary_zh: 大型人工智能模型的趋势仍在继续，中国推出了新的 Kimi K3 模型。凭借其数万亿个参数，它的功能与西方所能提供的最好的产品一样强大，而且价格更便宜。但它并没有那么快，引发了一场平衡性能、效率和成本以及主权控制的新斗争。

stories.title: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home

sources.title: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
sources.title_en: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
sources.title_original: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
sources.summary: We paired up and tested a pair of Dell's Pro Max with GB10, to see what a small cluster of Nvidia's Spark silicon can do. At $6332 each, as of writing, it's still an expensive prospect, but far cheaper and more desk-friendly than a big server box full of GPUs and the other necessary high-end hardware.
sources.summary_zh: 我们将一对戴尔 Pro Max 与 GB10 配对并进行了测试，看看一小群 Nvidia 的 Spark 芯片可以做什么。截至撰写本文时，它的售价为每台 6332 美元，仍然是一个昂贵的前景，但比装满 GPU 和其他必要高端硬件的大型服务器盒子便宜得多，也更适合桌面使用。

stories.title: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded

sources.title: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
sources.title_en: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
sources.title_original: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
sources.summary: A new Bloomberg report is claiming that Apple is working on a leasing program called "Apple Upgrade" that will allow customers to finance hardware over the course of 2 or 3 years. At the end of the term, they can keep the device or hand it back, or even upgrade to a newer model if payments are completed early.
sources.summary_zh: 彭博社的一份新报告称，苹果正在开发一项名为“Apple Upgrade”的租赁计划，该计划将允许客户在 2 到 3 年内为硬件提供融资。期限结束时，他们可以保留设备或归还设备，如果提前完成付款，甚至可以升级到更新的型号。

stories.title: Amazon data center in Bahrain struck and destroyed by Iranian cruise missiles, state media claims — attacks launched against AWS site in response to alleged US strikes on an under-construction nuclear plant

sources.title: Amazon data center in Bahrain struck and destroyed by Iranian cruise missiles, state media claims — attacks launched against AWS site in response to alleged US strikes on an under-construction nuclear plant
sources.title_en: Amazon data center in Bahrain struck and destroyed by Iranian cruise missiles, state media claims — attacks launched against AWS site in response to alleged US strikes on an under-construction nuclear plant
sources.title_original: Amazon data center in Bahrain struck and destroyed by Iranian cruise missiles, state media claims — attacks launched against AWS site in response to alleged US strikes on an under-construction nuclear plant
sources.summary: The Amazon site has suffered multiple hits since the start of the U.S. bombing campaign in Iran. The IRGC claims to have 'destroyed' AWB Bahrain, but the company has moved operations off the facility since early April.
sources.summary_zh: 自美国对伊朗发动轰炸以来，亚马逊网站遭受多次攻击。伊斯兰革命卫队声称已经“摧毁”了巴林 AWB，但该公司自 4 月初以来已将业务从该设施转移出去。

stories.title: SCOOP – AMD 的 MI500X ISA 刚刚发布，它有 1 个供所有专家共享的 TDM MOE 描述符。就像MI455X添加TDM（昵称RMA）一样，它是NVIDIA SM90 Hopper ISA TMA的复制品。 https://t.co/WKB… / SCOOP – AMD's MI500X ISA JUST GOT RELEASED AND IT HAS 1 TDM MOE DESCRIPTOR SHARED ACROSS ALL EXPERTS. Just like how MI455X is adding TDM (nicknamed RMA), which is a copy of NVIDIA's SM90 Hopper ISA TMA. https://t.co/WKB…
